item.title: [Resolved] SRPM builds done in Copr are failing
item.description: SRPM builds happening in Copr (for packages using the srpm_build_deps config key) are failing due to a dependency issue. We are working on a fix.
item.content: SRPM builds happening in Copr (for packages using the srpm_build_deps config key) are failing due to a dependency issue. We are working on a fix.

item.title: [Resolved] Longer response times
item.description: Our service got overwhelmed by the events coming from a Fedora dist-git (caused by the epel-9 branching) causing the longer responses. We have scaled up the workers and the queue is getting shorter. We are planning the next steps to be resilient next time. Sorry about the disturbance. update: The queue is now empty and you can expect regular operational times.
item.content:
Our service got overwhelmed by the events coming from a Fedora dist-git (caused by the epel-9 branching) causing the longer responses.

We have scaled up the workers and the queue is getting shorter. We are planning the next steps to be resilient next time. Sorry about the disturbance.

update: The queue is now empty and you can expect regular operational times.

item.title: [Resolved] Moving production Packit Service to a new cluster
item.description: We are going to move deployment of our production Packit Service to a new cluster. It should take about 1/2 an hour, during which the workers will be down and queries to API & dashboard won’t work properly because the database will be being migrated. Any requests submitted to the API meanwhile should, however, be fulfilled once the workers are up again.
item.content: We are going to move deployment of our production Packit Service to a new cluster. It should take about 1/2 an hour, during which the workers will be down and queries to API & dashboard won’t work properly because the database will be being migrated. Any requests submitted to the API meanwhile should, however, be fulfilled once the workers are up again.

item.title: [Resolved] PostgreSQL db upgrade
item.description: Upgrading our PostgreSQL database from version 10 to version 12.
item.content: Upgrading our PostgreSQL database from version 10 to version 12.
